channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Kemuri gameplay trailer shows off yokai battling and great fashion
item.description: JPop Demon Hunters? Yes please.

item.title: A Rayman Legends remake will arrive on October 1
item.description: The standard version of Rayman Legends Retold will cost $40.

item.title: Insomniac Games' Wolverine looks comically violent
item.description: The first gameplay trailer shows off bloody melee combat.

item.title: “AI is now useful”: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang thinks a new era for AI is here - and its partnership with Microsoft could be key for achieving it
item.description: Now that AI is actually proving useful, more and more of us will actually benefit, Nvidia CEO says.

item.title: Here’s seven bloody minutes of Wolverine on the PS5
item.description: At its big State of Play show on Tuesday, Sony shared new look Marvel's Wolverine, the next big title from Insomniac Games that's launching exclusively on PS5 on September 15th. Dressed in the iconic yellow Wolverine outfit, Logan slunk around and stabbed his way through a bunch of enemies, using his blades to take them […]

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch Love Island USA season 8 for free
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream Love Island USA season 8 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Want a Runna Premium membership for free? Global Running Day is on June 3, and all you have to do to get 2 weeks free is log a 5k on Strava — and if you've got an Apple or Garmin Watch, you can also nab a 'limited edition award'
item.description: How Apple Watch, Garmin and Strava users could earn rewards for Global Running Day, including a free two week Runna membership.

item.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day fans can see the new Marvel movie early thanks to Amazon Prime — it's the worst-kept secret on the internet this week
item.description: Spider-Man: Brand New Day is set to be released on July 31, but if you don't want to wait that long to see it, Amazon Prime has you covered.

item.title: AI isn’t the real reason college grads can’t find jobs
item.description: There might be a bigger culprit for the rising unemployment rate among young workers, according to new research. College graduates are up against a number of forces as they navigate the current job market—AI being chief among them. As companies cut entry-level jobs and cite AI adoption to justify layoffs, new entrants to the workforce have found themselves in an especially precarious position. By the end of 2025, unemployment among young college graduates had soared to 5.6%. ...

item.title: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
item.description: While the majority of Summer Game Fest takes place over the weekend, Sony is getting a jump on things with its next State of Play showcase, which airs on June 2nd at 5PM ET. It’s coming at a pivotal time for the PlayStation brand: The PS5 keeps getting more expensive and Sony’s big bet on […]

item.title: Piratage de 34 millions de dossiers médicaux : l’Assurance Maladie dément, le hacker persiste
item.description: Soupçons de piratage massif, démenti officiel et nouvelles revendications d’un hacker : en moins de 24 heures, l’affaire du Dossier Médical Partagé continue de semer le doute.

item.title: New internal Microsoft memo shows shifting employee sentiment
item.description: According to Microsoft’s biannual “Employee Signals” survey, employees feel energized to do meaningful work but worse about coaching and feedback from managers. According to a recent internal memo, Microsoft employees are feeling positive about producing meaningful work, but less so about coaching, feedback and motivation from managers, Business Insider reports....

item.title: Nearly 6 million Carnival customers may have had personal information stolen in hack
item.description: Carnival says the breach exposed everything from birth dates and phone numbers to government-issued IDs. If you’ve ever cruised on a Carnival ship, your personal information might have been exposed in a recent hack.

item.title: Amazon Luna adds Hollow Knight to its catalog for June
item.description: Hollow Knight joins the Amazon Luna game catalog this month.

item.title: Cyberdecks are having a moment, rejecting big tech surveillance with style and substance
item.description: Over the last few months, these DIY hardware communities have exploded in popularity as people on social media show off their solar-powered game emulators, pocket-sized ereaders, and clamshell purse computers.

item.title: Anonymous video chat app leaks data on millions of users — more than 22 million records exposed, including 3 million containing names and email addresses
item.description: A not-so-private anonymous video chat app has compromised credentials, including usernames, emails, and network information, thanks to a misconfigured Kibana dashboard.

item.title: Massive Las Vegas Sphere competitors’ debut in China with simpler setups and a Temu-like, 92% lower price point
item.description: China is opening two immersive LED dome venues that mimic Sphere concepts while costing far less and emphasizing culture.

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers is giving fans what they want: Affordable tickets to phone-free shows
item.description: The indie singer-songwriter’s return to the spotlight is shaping up to be different than the rest. In a world where tickets to see artists like Harry Styles at New York’s Madison Square Garden can cost $1,000, musician Phoebe Bridgers has a counteroffer: $1.

item.title: How to watch NHL Stanley Cup Final 2026: live stream Vegas Golden Knights vs Carolina Hurricanes, TV channels, preview for Game 1
item.description: Here's how to watch Golden Knights vs Hurricanes live streams online in the 2026 Stanley Cup Final, as the NHL's biggest prize is up for grabs.

item.title: I spent 3 hours with Lego’s new Pokémon Smart Play sets — they solve the Smart Brick’s biggest problems, and are simply perfect
item.description: The Pokémon Lego Smart Play sets are a triumph of everything that makes Lego and Pokémon a delight.

item.title: Trump amends steel, aluminum, and copper tariffs, offering farmers some relief
item.description: The temporary changes go into effect Monday and will expire at the end of 2027. President Donald Trump on Monday adjusted tariffs on some steel, aluminum, and copper imports, lowering some tariffs on farming equipment and extending the lower rate to other equipment.

item.title: I held the next-gen handheld
item.description: Intel couldn't catch a break. Layoffs. Shakedowns. Crashing CPUs torpedoing its reputation, sending desktop gamers fleeing to AMD. Apple and Qualcomm pushing Intel out of multiple flagship laptops. A gaming graphics card going MIA. But its Panther Lake laptop chip, the first on its all-important 18A process, turned out excellent - and a handheld version […]...
